official_long_name: Startup Accelerator of MeitY for Product Innovation, Development and Growth
owning_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
programme_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
implementing_agency: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), Digital India Corporation
review_notes: Permanent SAMRIDH identity and MeitY ownership are confirmed. The official scheme document identifies MeitY Startup Hub as implementing agency. Official evidence confirms later cohort implementation, including Cohort 2, but no currently open scheme-wide application window has been verified. Cohorts and application windows remain separate call instances.

official_long_name: Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs 2.0
owning_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
programme_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
implementing_agency: Innovation and IPR Division, MeitY, in association with 51 incubation centres
review_notes: Permanent TIDE 2.0 identity is preserved as a historical scheme. The official administrative approval specified implementation from 1 February 2019 to 31 January 2024 through Innovation and IPR Division, MeitY, with 51 incubation centres. No official extension or current application window has been verified. This historical decision is based on the administrative approval, not the contaminated 29 March 2023 page date.
